title: Calcutta High Court allows ECI to deploy government college faculty as presiding officers for West Bengal polls
description: The Calcutta High Court on Tuesday stayed a recent single-judge order that had set aside the Election Commission of India’s (ECI) decision to appoint government college faculty as presiding officers for the upcoming West Bengal Assembly elections [The Election Commission of India & Ors. v. Rupa Banerjee Nee Samjpati].A Division Bench of Justice Shampa Sarkar and Justice Ajay Kumar Gupta was examining the April 17 single-judge order which had quashed the deployment of assistant and associate
